name: Dash 2 Cash Pawn Shop
description_short: Army Veteran-owned pawn shop in Greater Columbus, Ohio, operating since 2014. Buys, sells, and pawns items with a focus on fair pricing and customer service.
description_long:
Dash 2 Cash Pawn Shop is an Army Veteran-owned pawn operation located in the Greater Columbus, Ohio area that has been serving the community since 2014. The shop positions itself as a customer-focused alternative to traditional pawn experiences, emphasizing a welcoming and respectful environment. The business operates both a physical storefront and online sales channels, including an eBay store and lay-away program.

The shop offers standard pawn services including buying items outright, accepting items as collateral for loans, and selling both new and used merchandise. Their inventory spans jewelry, electronics, firearms, musical equipment, tools, shoes, and gift cards. Customers can access items through their physical location on a first-come-first-serve basis or browse online listings. The company advertises a price-match guarantee of 10% more than local competitors with a recent receipt.

Dash 2 Cash differentiates itself primarily through customer service claims and staff attitude. The website emphasizes a "welcoming and upbeat environment" and highlights staff members by name (Chris and Josh). They report 5-star ratings with over 75 customer reviews on Google. Notably, customer reviews mention staff going beyond standard service—such as carrying items to customers' cars and explaining pricing breakdowns. The company also advertises flexible terms, including holding pawned items beyond standard redemption periods.

As a pawn shop, this business functions as a collateral-based lending alternative for consumers needing quick cash. While customer satisfaction appears genuine based on review content, pawn loans typically carry high effective interest rates when annualized, and customers risk losing pawned items if unable to repay. The 10% price-match guarantee suggests competitive local market pressure. The lack of specific information about loan terms, interest rates, or fees represents a limitation in evaluating the true cost of their services compared to alternatives.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Army Veteran ownership with stated community mission focus
Operating since 2014 with established local presence in Greater Columbus
Claims 10% price-match guarantee compared to other local pawn shops with recent receipt
Reports 5-star rating with over 75 verified Google customer reviews
Named staff (Chris, Josh) mentioned by customers for personalized service and explanations
Flexible redemption terms—documented to hold pawned items beyond standard periods
Multiple sales channels: physical shop, eBay store, and lay-away program
Wide inventory variety including jewelry, electronics, firearms, musical equipment, tools, and shoes
cons: No published loan terms, interest rates, or fee schedule on website for transparency comparison
Pawn loans carry high annualized interest rates compared to traditional lending alternatives
Risk of item forfeiture if loan cannot be repaid by deadline
Limited information about specific loan amounts, redemption periods, or renewal policies
Physical location only specified as 'Greater Columbus, Ohio' with no specific address or hours on website
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own items of value (jewelry, electronics, instruments, tools)
Individuals with damaged credit history unable to access traditional personal loans
People seeking to buy used items at discounted prices in specific categories
Customers prioritizing friendly service and explanation of transaction terms over lowest possible price
diagnosis: Dash 2 Cash Pawn Shop is best for consumers with immediate cash needs who own valuable items and prioritize service quality, but should understand that pawn loans are expensive short-term debt with forfeiture risk. The lack of published terms and rates makes it essential to visit in person or call before committing to understand the actual cost of borrowing versus alternatives like personal loans or credit lines.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal items as collateral
Price-match guarantee (10% more than competitors with receipt)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
